**Infrastructure Operations — 15 services, 5 environments**

**Key IDs:** API Q7KJPHFB, cron F76UY394, S3 42S49WY4, DB PE4CWYWY, rollback 86RDGGAX, queue 5HBBS363, registry 3CNSYPKY, incident QYRPCFU4, SSH E8C5GA5T, VPN YRR7ZJMT, flag 9FRBX6YW, artifact XUUZB5G7, license 7J6PJQJX, TLS 6YRRHWJN, nonce 9BRT6YGW, dashboard V7MEYQYJ.

**Services:** scheduler-core, export-pipeline, cache-warmer, billing-worker, session-manager, auth-service, notification-daemon, ingest-api, metrics-collector, webhook-relay, search-indexer, user-profile-service, payment-gateway, report-builder, audit-logger.

**Environments:** green/blue pools, staging, production, dev sandbox, QA cluster, canary.

**Recent Activity:** ~50+ operations completed across all services/environments (restart, migrate, inspect, scale up/down, pause, resume, reconfigure, redeploy, rollback, drain, health-check, patch, downgrade, upgrade). Outcomes: error rates stabilized, alerts cleared, queues drained, memory/latency normalized. Most completed without errors or recovered after brief stalls. Documentation/runbooks updated; follow-up tasks filed. Logs archived; Grafana showed expected patterns. No customer impact. Pager remained quiet.
